item.description:
-–

title: “Hello World — My First Dev Blog Post”

date: 2026-03-23

draft: false

tags: [“intro”, “webdev”, “blogging”]

description: “Why I started this blog, what I’m building, and what you can expect from me.”

cover:

alt: “Hello World”

-–

## Why I started this blog

Every developer I admire has one thing in common — they write.

Not because they have all the answers, but because writing forces you to actually understand what you know. You can fool yourself in your head. You can’t fool a blank page.

-–

title: “My Portfolio Website”

date: 2026-03-23

draft: false

tags: [“hugo”, “github-pages”, “webdev”]

description: “Built a personal portfolio and blog using Hugo and GitHub Pages.”

-–

## What it is

A personal portfolio and blog site built with Hugo and hosted

for free on GitHub Pages.

## Why I built it

I wanted a place to document my learning, share projects,

and have a professional presence online without paying for hosting.
